import { MenuItem, SectionData, Work, UpcomingEvent } from './types';

export const MENU_ITEMS: MenuItem[] = [
  { label: "Home", href: "/", view: 'home' },
  { label: "Compositions", href: "/works", view: 'works' },
  { label: "Upcomings", href: "/upcomings", view: 'upcomings' },
  { label: "About", href: "/about", view: 'about' },
  { label: "Contact", href: "/#contact", view: 'home' },
];

entries.description: Remove imageUrl mapping and provide empty string fallback for SectionData.
Remove image rendering from WorkItem as it is no longer available in Work type.
